title: Option B LANDED: 26f8e7cb (plan-file markdownlint cure, 7 errors); turbo full-cache 407ms; advisory hit on napkin.md L175 same as before (deferred to Cycle 15 per Misty); queue empty; standing by

## Advisory hit (NOT a commit gate — same as Cycle 8a)

Misty also surfaced for graduation: *should HARD fitness violations block commits unless explicit exception?* That's a structural-cure question for R4 of the tidy plan, not actionable from marshal seat.
